title: (Bullish Signal) TWLO, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling TWLO's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 42 similar cases where TWLO's MACD histogram became positive, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 88%.Current price $299.96 crossed the resistance line at $296.96 and is trading between $306.24 resistance and $296.96 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 10/21/20 - 11/20/20, the price experienced a -0.13% Downtrend, while the week of 11/13/20 - 11/20/20 shows a +9% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/qncvnfhc31161.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=b85817cd3c4238a0bb355418f5a11ffc6b159eba

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 34 of 44 cases where TWLO's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 20, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on TWLO as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 53 of 67 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

TWLO moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 11, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for TWLO crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 05, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 8 of 10 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +6.95% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TWLO advanced for three days, in 264 of 310 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.
